name: Adapter Regression Monitor — Workato Native Blueprint
summary: Replays golden payloads through CRM, meeting, identity, and delivery adapters to catch functional regressions before connector changes break reusable workflow patterns. Native-first Workato blueprint that favors recipe functions, custom connectors, and native delivery/connectivity surfaces over raw HTTP steps.

native_connectors_required: Meeting-system connector or approved custom connector for transcript intake
Lookup tables, data tables, or project properties for routing and canonical maps
prohibited_patterns: No repeated Universal HTTP or ad hoc API request actions for Slack, CRM, calendar, or email delivery
No credentials stored in formula literals, project properties comments, or recipe notes
No agent output sent straight to transport or records without JSON schema validation
No routing, dedupe, or retry logic hidden inside opaque code snippets when Recipe Functions or data tables can own it

recipe_functions.purpose: Normalize the Adapter Regression Monitor trigger into the shared run_context contract.
Load and normalize the primary Adapter Regression Monitor business inputs into source_record objects.
Join the intermediate context needed for Adapter Regression Monitor, especially Load Golden Scenarios, Replay Adapter Cases.
Render normalized delivery_payload objects for Adapter Regression Monitor.
Capture deterministic summary, dedupe, and retry state for Adapter Regression Monitor.

steps: Use native connector action for Load Golden Scenarios
Use native connector action for Replay Adapter Cases
Use an LLM connector or AI step to return strict JSON for AI Regression Analysis
Use native connector for Deliver QA Findings
Record deterministic run summary and retry state

ai_regression_analysis.intent: AI Agent summarizes behavior drift, root-cause hypotheses, and which workflows are likely impacted.

deployment_notes: Store connector configuration, defaults, and destination IDs in connection objects or project properties.
Use lookup tables or data tables for routing maps, dedupe keys, and canonical mappings.
Keep synthesis agentic, but keep delivery and persistence deterministic.
